name: Default workspace shows submission readiness and LOOP.md preview
description: When a visitor opens LoopLedger for the first time, the workspace should show the project identity, submission readiness checklist, and generated LOOP.md preview without requiring setup.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the LoopLedger live app
Verify the workspace header identifies the project as LoopLedger
Verify the submission readiness section shows the final post checklist with live app URL, repository URL, external access, and CLI run evidence items
Verify the LOOP.md live preview includes Submission Readiness and Agent Loop Timeline sections
